text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It seems I've injured myself. I can only apologize. I
accept full responsibility.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I know my own body. I felt my limits approaching.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And yet I failed to stop myself in time. I blithely
regarded them as a challenge.
choice_data_list: Let's slow things down for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Quite. Rest assured, I am contrite. If I wish to
conquer myself, first, I must know myself.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And I must learn to walk before I can run. I will
bear that lesson firmly in mind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will rise to any challenge that my imperial calling
demands.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But for now, I remain constrained. And I admit,
frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hah. I always end up showing you my worst side,
don't I?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How am I ever to overcome my limits with a heart
so frail?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Still, while I cannot train my body for a while, I
can train my mind as I please!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You have opened my eyes, Trainer. I owe you a
debt!
